description: Product Description Previous page Next page Premium Grade Gloves Keep hands and surfaces protected by wearing these Ambitex powder-free. Disposable Nitrile Gloves create a barrier between your hands and objects you are handling to keep hands clean and keep oils and dirt on your hands from transferring to the objects. Single-use gloves are throw away after each task to cross-contamination. This disposable gloves are worn in laboratories, food service, clean rooms, and environments, and when cleaning or performing janitorial tasks Medical and Healthcare This Latex free and powder free gloves is vital for people with allergies to natural rubber latex Cleaning Services A perfect gloves for professional and household cleaning, it is more comfortable for cleaning purposes. Health and Beauty This Gloves can be use for hair and beauty, Nail Salons, Tattoo artist and all beauticians. This gloves can handle dyes, epoxy and paints. Food and Beverage A latex free and powder free gloves is perfectly suitable for home and kitchen, cook with comfort and ease! the textured fingertips offer better grip. Previous page Next page 1 Medical Gloves 2 Cleaning Gloves 3 Food Gloves 4 5 What are nitrile gloves? Nitrile gloves are disposable protective gloves made from a synthetic rubber called nitrile. They are commonly used in various industries and healthcare settings for hand protection. What are the advantages of using nitrile gloves? Nitrile Gloves are High puncture resistance, Excellent chemical resistance ,Latex-free, reducing the risk of allergies ,Good tactile sensitivity, Strong and durable and good for Medical Use. Are nitrile gloves safe for individuals with latex allergies? Yes, nitrile gloves are an excellent alternative for individuals with latex allergies because they are latex-free. They do not contain natural rubber latex proteins that can trigger allergic reactions. Can nitrile gloves be reused? Nitrile gloves are generally designed for single-use and disposal. While some gloves may withstand multiple uses, it is not recommended as the gloves may become compromised during use, leading to reduced protection. Can nitrile gloves be used for food handling? Yes, nitrile gloves can be used for food handling. However, it is essential to choose gloves that are explicitly labeled as food-safe or meet relevant food-handling regulations in your region.
